examples: If surviving copies are few, the stemma perforce brings into proximity manuscripts that were widely separated in time and place of origin.
What is true for TV broadcasts will perforce also apply to print media.
Check out and edit files in Perforce.
Since Krugman believes that more transfer payments will pay for themselves, he must, perforce, believe tax cuts pay for themselves.
In economics, the kind of engagement of recent years must, perforce, cease.
